prompt: This deserialises untrusted bytes. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Validate the object's fields after readObject() returns
Catch and log the deserialisation exception
Avoid native deserialisation of untrusted data; use a safe format (e.g. JSON) with a strict schema, or an allow-list of permitted classes

explanation: Gadget chains execute DURING readObject(), before you ever see the object, so validating fields afterwards is too late (CWE-502). The robust fix is to not natively deserialise untrusted input at all — use JSON with a schema, or restrict to an allow-list of classes.
source_reference: CWE-502; OWASP A08:2021 (Software and Data Integrity Failures)

options.text: Avoid native deserialisation of untrusted data; use a safe format (e.g. JSON) with a strict schema, or an allow-list of permitted classes
Catch and log the deserialisation exception
Validate the object's fields after readObject() returns
Encrypt the serialised bytes before reading them

explanation: Gadget chains execute DURING readObject(), before you ever see the object, so validating fields afterwards is too late (CWE-502). The robust fix is to not natively deserialise untrusted input at all — use JSON with a schema, or restrict to an allow-list of classes.
